Headline: #53 Pulaski Temporary Reroute at Pulaski/Cornelia
ShortDescription: #53 Pulaski buses are temp. rerouted in both directions via Pulaski, Addison, Kimball, Belmont & Pulaski due to fire department activity near Pulaski/Cornelia.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Pulaski, Addison, Kimball, Belmont, then resume their normal route on Pulaski.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to fire department activity near Pulaski/Cornelia.
